name: Undertale: Omniversal Brawl
description:
yeah it’s kinda like soul ops

z!insanity sans is madness sans for this one (they’re literally the same thing)

c!insanity sans is just called insanity sans

you decide what you’re defending

ik you looking at this riddle major 🫵😂

kill the stupid ahh skeletons

i have no fucking motivation so im releasing this early

W.I.P

Update 1: Probably patched something about the bosses, hopefully they don’t surrender or call upon each other now. Just edit the message if they still do that.

Upcoming Modes: Extreme Mode, Devastating Mode, Godly Mode, Inevitable Mode, Absolution Mode, NULL Mode, The Finale

Current Modes: Easy Mode, Normal Mode, Hard Mode, Insane Mode

Upcoming Bosses for the following modes.

Upcoming Bosses for Extreme Mode, the next mode to be added: Epic Sans, Dream Sans, Nightmare Sans, Delta Sans (has 2 phases), Ink Sans, Error Sans, Fatal Error.

Upcoming Bosses for Devastating Mode: DustDust, Insanity Sans, Reaper Sans, NightDust, ErrorDust, Avenge, Corruption Sans, Cataclysmic Dust

Upcoming Bosses for Godly Mode: Alpha Sans, True Dust, Corrupted Insanity, Infected, Superfell, Omnipotent, Final Dust, Virus404 (his base form is easier than true dust, but he has overkill as a phase 2 which is why he’s harder than final dust), Error404 (Error666 is his phase 2), King Multiverse (has emperor multiverse as phase 2, which is why he’s this high), Death, Lulzec, Code Rainbow, Anti God

Upcoming Bosses for Inevitable Mode: Distortion, True Insanity, Saur, King Chaos, Super Dust, Reality Destroyer, sand underman, B.U.T.T.E.R.F.L.Y, Sans The Skeleton (or “Godverse”)

Upcoming Bosses for Absolution Mode: Oblivion, Perfect 404, Pesto, Corrupted True Insanity

Upcoming Bosses for NULL Mode: Empowered Reality Destroyer, Titan of Chaos, Commander of The Legion, General Exostar

Upcoming Final Boss: TRUE BALDO (Superboss)

Upcoming Secret Bosses: Fatal Corruption (Devastating Mode), Final Corrupted Insanity (Godly Mode), MYDOOM (Godly Mode), Final True Insanity (Inevitable Mode), Transcended Empowered Reality Destroyer (NULL Mode, Nearly Impossible), THE BIG BANG (The Finale, Nearly Impossible), TRUEST BALDO (The Finale, Nearly Impossible), ENTITY 0 (Any mode, IMPOSSIBLE, Survival Boss Fight)
creator: PRESIDENT MIND - ALL OF THE WORLD’S TAXES
